reasoning: We're focusing on your primary limiter: lactate clearance and fatigue resistance. Your last ride showed steady aerobic work, but to handle the demands of the Alpine Loop, we need to push your boundaries with targeted over-under efforts. Enhancing your ability to clear lactate during these efforts will mimic the specific demands of the Alpine Loop's sustained climbs.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 2 sets: 10 min @ 201-218W, 2 min @ 242-256W, repeat 2 times. 5 min easy spin between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
